violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Clean tray shelving and prep counter next to the prep sink noted not properly cleaned/maintained.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen around one of the garbage cans noted in need of cleaning. Also the floor around the feet of the equipment near the fryers noted in need of cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outsides of the rolling rice and sugar bins black rolling cart reach-in cooler door gaskets top of the cooler under prep line and the side of the equipment next to the garbage can; all noted not clean.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Box of straws noted being stored on the floor.
